pi_items.source: Microsoft Edge documentation and Linux forum posts confirm this is the standard bookmarks file location for Microsoft Edge on Linux
Standard Linux desktop directory path. Desktop folder at ~/Desktop corresponds to /home/[username]/Desktop/

pi_items.verified_value: Khan Academy (www.khanacademy.org) is a real nonprofit educational organization founded in 2008 offering free online learning resources in mathematics and other subjects
pi_items.source: Khan Academy official website and web search results confirm domain and organization

pi_items.verified_value: Desmos (desmos.com) is a real graphing calculator platform offering free online graphing, scientific, and 3D calculators at www.desmos.com
pi_items.source: Desmos official website and web search results confirm domain and service

pi_items.verified_value: PhET Interactive Simulations (phet.colorado.edu) is a real project from University of Colorado Boulder founded in 2002, providing free interactive math and science simulations
pi_items.source: PhET official website and University of Colorado documentation confirm domain and organization

pi_items.verified_value: CommonLit (www.commonlit.org) is a real nonprofit edtech platform providing free digital reading program with over 3,000 texts for grades 3-12
pi_items.source: CommonLit official website confirms domain and organization as serving 30+ million teachers and students

pi_items.verified_value: Newsela (newsela.com) is a real instructional content platform founded in 2013 providing news-as-literacy with articles in five Lexile levels
pi_items.source: Newsela official website confirms domain and organization as serving 3.3 million teachers and 40 million students

pi_items.verified_value: ReadWorks (www.readworks.org) is a real nonprofit edtech organization providing free, research-based reading comprehension resources for K-12
pi_items.source: ReadWorks official website confirms domain, organization, and free access to thousands of reading passages

pi_items.verified_value: National Geographic Education (education.nationalgeographic.org) is a real educational portal by National Geographic Society with resources and teaching tools
pi_items.source: National Geographic official education portal (education.nationalgeographic.org) confirmed; metadata uses base domain which contains full subdomain in URL

pi_items.verified_value: NASA (nasa.gov) maintains learning resources including STEM engagement programs at www.nasa.gov/learning-resources/
pi_items.source: NASA official website confirms STEM Engagement office and learning resources program

pi_items.verified_value: Library of Congress (www.loc.gov) maintains teacher programs and resources at www.loc.gov/programs/teachers/
pi_items.source: Library of Congress official website confirms teacher programs and educational resources

pi_items.metadata_value: District Resources with sub-folders: Math & STEM Tools, Literacy & Reading, Reference & Research
pi_items.verified_value: Folder names and structure match task description exactly; folder names are: District Resources (parent), Math & STEM Tools, Literacy & Reading, Reference & Research (children)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses nine real, publicly accessible educational websites: Khan Academy (khanacademy.org), Desmos (desmos.com), PhET Interactive Simulations (phet.colorado.edu), CommonLit (commonlit.org), Newsela (newsela.com), ReadWorks (readworks.org), National Geographic Education (education.nationalgeographic.org), NASA Learning Resources (nasa.gov), and Library of Congress Teachers (loc.gov). The Microsoft Edge bookmarks file is correctly located at /home/ga/.config/microsoft-edge/Default/Bookmarks on Linux. The export and instructions files should be created on the Desktop at /home/ga/Desktop/. The task requires organizing these nine bookmarks into three folders (Math & STEM Tools, Literacy & Reading, Reference & Research) under a parent 'District Resources' folder, exporting to HTML, and creating an instructional text file.
